odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
        
            

                
                
                XE Meal Service
                
                
                
                    odoo.define("xe_lunch_kiosk.boot", ["@xe_lunch_kiosk/js/kiosk_app"], function (require) {
                        const { createLunchKiosk } = require("@xe_lunch_kiosk/js/kiosk_app");
                        createLunchKiosk(document);
                    });
